titleEn: J-Skip (Tokubetsu Kodo Jinzai) — Qualifying but not officially recognized — Child of Japanese National
titleJa: 特別高度人材（要件に該当するが確認未取得）（日本人の子）
notes: This checklist has two parts: (A) base documents depending on your current visa type, and (B) J-Skip specific documents.
For Part A, refer to the checklist corresponding to your current visa and submit the specified items.
Japanese-issued certificates must be dated within 3 months of application.
Documents in foreign languages must include a Japanese translation.
Additional documents may be requested during the review process.
For details on J-Skip (特別高度人材制度) requirements, see the Immigration Services Agency website.
